remediation_validation_residual_risk.validation_summary: Passed local NGINX regex search and verify_tls_socket_version unit test assertion verifying TLSv1.3 exclusive constraint.
remediation_validation_residual_risk.residual_risk_description: Active SSL socket enforcement depends on Kubernetes Ingress controller configuration mapping in the live cluster.

remediation_validation_residual_risk.validation_summary: Passed mock base64 token parsing validations verifying matching signature fields and issuer claims locally.
remediation_validation_residual_risk.residual_risk_description: Live production token validation requires external OIDC provider reachability for public JWKS resolution.

remediation_validation_residual_risk.validation_summary: Passed temporary local SQLite DB persistence write testing with correct auto-generated UUID fields.
remediation_validation_residual_risk.residual_risk_description: Sqlite is for local/staging only; production requires migrations to GCP Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance.

remediation_validation_residual_risk.validation_summary: Passed double-submit and replay protection testing inside MutationGate utilizing a local dictionary nonce cache.
remediation_validation_residual_risk.residual_risk_description: Local dictionary cache is volatile and not shared across horizontal pod scalings; requires Redis mapping in production.

remediation_validation_residual_risk.validation_summary: Passed generate-release-manifest pipeline validation verifying SBOM and in-toto provenance files generation.
remediation_validation_residual_risk.residual_risk_description: Validates creation but not policy enforcement at deployment; depends on proper GKE Binary Authorization configuration.

remediation_validation_residual_risk.validation_summary: Passed Prometheus request and denial counter instrumentation unit testing.
remediation_validation_residual_risk.residual_risk_description: Exporter exposes port 8000; relies on Istio network rules to prevent public access in production.

remediation_validation_residual_risk.validation_summary: Passed copy routines and sqlite database schema validation tests on backup snapshots.
remediation_validation_residual_risk.residual_risk_description: Local file replication only; production requires Cloud Storage replication and retention configurations.

remediation_validation_residual_risk.validation_summary: Passed CI release manifest compilation validation successfully.
remediation_validation_residual_risk.residual_risk_description: Compliance artifacts are stored locally; requires GCS bucket retention rules and access control mapping.
